title: Library of Congress: Japanese American Internment Sources
description: A LOC source card for primary sources about Japanese American incarceration during World War II.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: Library of Congress resources on Japanese American incarceration include photographs, documents, personal accounts, and context for studying civil liberties during wartime.
Use this source for careful historical inquiry, evaluating government decisions, discussing constitutional rights, and reading personal testimony with context.
Rights vary by item in Library of Congress collections. Review each source page before mirroring images, oral histories, or documents into classroom materials.
